plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate that risk.
Reduce exposure to QQQ and CRWD to lower concentration.
Increase allocation to income ETF QQQI for stability.
Trim SPY to meet single name limit and add cash buffer.
Add METU from scanner for controlled growth potential.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with lower risk.
conservative.read: This plan aims for roughly 1.5% monthly return by heavily reducing leverage and concentration. Expect lower drawdowns but also capped upside potential.

plan: Trim leveraged ETF SOXL to a minimal position.
Reduce QQQ and QQQI to free up capital and lower concentration.
Trim SPY to meet single name limits and create a cash buffer.
Add to CRWD and buy MSFT for quality tech exposure.
Initiate a small position in RDDT for its high reward potential.
This plan balances growth with risk reduction.
balanced.read: This plan targets around 2.5% monthly return by reducing leverage and concentration while adding quality names. Expect moderate drawdowns and growth potential.

plan: Increase SOXL to fully utilize leveraged ETF allowance.
Trim QQQ and SPY to reduce broad index exposure and concentration.
Add to CRWD and buy MSFT, focusing on strong tech names.
Buy RDDT for its high reward potential, adding to concentration.
Hold SPAL but do not add, awaiting a better setup.
This plan aims for aggressive growth using leverage and concentration.
aggressive.read: This plan targets roughly 4% monthly return by maximizing leverage and concentrating in high-scoring setups, including leveraged ETFs. Expect significantly higher potential drawdowns and the risk of rapid losses due to leverage and ETF decay.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs and volatile single names like SMH and CRWD.
Reduce QQQ exposure to prioritize income and stability.
Significantly increase QQQI for steady monthly distributions.
Add to SPY for broad market stability and some income potential.
This plan focuses on preserving capital and generating income.
The goal is reliable monthly distributions with minimal NAV fluctuation.
income.read: This plan aims for roughly 1% monthly return by prioritizing income-generating assets and broad market stability. Expect very low drawdowns but limited growth potential. Distributions are variable and not guaranteed.
